model_score_write_path.transaction_boundary: No explicit application transaction is present. CandidateScoringService batches updates in memory, but DatabasePickCandidateRepository loops and sends one Supabase UPDATE per candidate id. Each row update is its own DB request/transaction boundary.
model_score_write_path.batching_details: CandidateScoringService.run accumulates ModelScoreUpdate rows and flushes when updates.length >= batchSize; default batchSize is 200. The repository method name is batch-oriented, but the database implementation performs per-row UPDATE calls in a loop.
model_score_write_path.model_score_null_details: pick_candidates.model_score is numeric NULL in migration 202604090002; service loads candidates where model_score === null and writes only scored rows.

scoring_run_metadata_exists.pick_candidates_scan_run_id: exists as text and is written during candidate upsert/materialization, not candidate scoring
scoring_run_metadata_exists.system_runs_table: exists with uuid id, but candidate scoring does not currently attach a system_runs.id to score writes
scoring_run_metadata_exists.experiment_ledger: exists and is used for shadow comparison records after scoring, but it is not the candidate scoring run identifier

insertion_point.description: Add model_registry_id, scoring_run_id, and ownership_timestamp to each ModelScoreUpdate when pushing the score update, using the champion.id resolved at lines 176-178 and validated before scoring continues.
insertion_point.repository_change: Extend ModelScoreUpdate with model_registry_id, scoring_run_id, and ownership_timestamp.
insertion_point.database_write_change: Write model_registry_id, scoring_run_id, and ownership_timestamp in the same UPDATE payload as model_score/model_tier/model_confidence.

future_lookup_predicate.registry_entity_type: in champion_model, challenger_model, shadow_model as appropriate for scoring mode
future_lookup_predicate.source_type_compatibility: contains system-pick-scanner or board-construction ownership source
future_lookup_predicate.active_state_or_status: must be active scoring state; disabled and retired rejected

files: packages/db/src/database-smoke or equivalent DB contract test
runtime_change_plan.summary: Resolve the scoring owner before score calculation, reject disabled/retired or missing owner, and write model_registry_id/scoring_run_id/ownership_timestamp atomically with model_score.
